# Classic Spaghetti Carbonara Recipe

## Ingredients:
- 12 oz (340g) spaghetti
- 4 large eggs
- ½ cup (60g) freshly grated Pecorino Romano cheese, plus more for serving
- ¼ cup (50g) finely chopped guanciale or pancetta
- 2 cloves garlic, minced
- Salt and black pepper to taste
- Pinch of fresh red pepper flakes (optional)
